title: Diagon Alley
prose: Diagon Alley opens up beyond a crooked archway in a brick wall behind the Leaky Cauldron — one tap from a wand-wielding stranger, and the bricks fold themselves away into a street that goes on further than seems possible from the outside.
Gringotts comes first: a vast marble hall run by unsmiling goblins, followed by a stomach-lurching cart ride down to a vault deep underground for the coins you'll need.

The rest of the morning disappears into Flourish and Blotts, thumbing through the entire first-year booklist, and Madam Malkin's Robes for All Occasions, where you're measured for school robes while another nervous first-year gets pinned up on the stool beside you. {{upbringing-reaction}}
By the time you're done, your wand — {{wand-summary}} — feels like it's been in your pocket forever, not just since this morning.

choices.label: Duck into the Magical Menagerie for an owl.
Decide a pet can wait for another year.
